overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto: Vice City Definitive Edition showing the player character walking along Ocean Beach at dusk. The character moves steadily along the sandy shore with the Vice City hotel skyline and palm trees visible to the right, while other pedestrians walk in the vicinity under a purple sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban beach with hotel skyline backdrop

events.description: pedestrian in swimwear passes by quickly on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach toward the distant buildings, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: topless pedestrian in swim trunks walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: cluster of high-rise art deco and modern hotels lining the beachfront
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky along the promenade
sandy beach surface extending toward the water
low concrete wall separating the beach from the pedestrian promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban beach at dusk, with the player character walking forward along the sand. Tall hotel buildings line the right side of the frame against a purple sunset sky, while palm trees dot the promenade. A pedestrian in swimwear passes by on the right, and the beach stretches openly toward the ocean on the left.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the beach, maintaining steady forward momentum

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange outfit walking in the same direction on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the beach as the hotel buildings appear slightly closer on the right. The concrete promenade wall moves into the near field on the right side. A pedestrian in orange clothing walks parallel on the left, while the warm sunset lighting maintains the dusk atmosphere over the ocean.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a wide urban beach that gradually draws closer to the city's concrete promenade under a purple sunset sky. It begins with the player character walking across the open sand, with tall hotel buildings and palm trees framing the right side of the vista. As the character advances, the perspective shifts to bring the hotel skyline and the concrete promenade wall into the near field on the right. The scene then transitions as a pedestrian in orange clothing appears and walks parallel on the left, while the warm dusk lighting remains constant over the ocean.
